// SonarLint scope: Takes effect when THIS folder is the open VS Code workspace (File > Open Folder > Oneops-NextGen V1). SonarLint then analyzes only this project; these globs drop generated/vendor/data noise so the Problems panel shows only our code.
sonarlint.analysisExcludesStandalone: **/.venv/**, **/__pycache__/**, **/*.pyc, **/*_pb2.py, **/*_pb2_grpc.py, proto/**, contracts/**, data/**, docs/**, langgraph_docs/**, registries/**, ops/**, **/node_modules/**, src/oneops/api/static/**
